items.title: Purdue Lands Top-50 Recruit Ahead of 2025 Season
items.summary: The Boilermakers added another highly touted player to their roster, strengthening their frontcourt depth and boosting expectations for another deep tournament run.

items.title: Matt Painter Discusses Early Practice Standouts
items.summary: Head coach Matt Painter shared updates from the first week of practice, highlighting the development of key sophomores and the leadership of veteran guards.

items.title: Purdue Ranked #2 in Preseason AP Poll
items.summary: With returning All-American talent and a loaded roster, the Boilermakers open the season near the top of the rankings.

items.title: Field of 68: Purdue Season Preview Show
items.summary: The Field of 68 crew breaks down Purdue’s chances to cut down the nets this season.

items.title: BTN: Zach Edey Offseason Workout Feature
items.summary: BTN goes behind the scenes with Zach Edey as he prepares for his senior season.

items.title: Hammer & Rails: Keys to a Big Ten Championship
items.summary: Breaking down the key matchups and potential pitfalls that could determine Purdue’s conference fate.

items.title: Edey Named Preseason National Player of the Year
items.summary: Purdue’s star center is already drawing national attention ahead of the 2025-26 campaign.
